title: Energy Statement: Ageing with Ease
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for the resistance to getting older
excerpt: A short energy statement practice for releasing resistance to ageing. Works through a release statement on the fear or shame around getting older, followed by an allow statement that opens space for ageing as a natural process to move through.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure draws on the energy statement method from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you are resisting a birthday, dreading a number, or aware of a tight feeling around the fact of getting older.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice for the resistance to ageing. Two statements said three times each: one to release the fear or resistance, one to allow ageing to be a natural part of a life rather than a problem.
I am ready to release my resistance to getting older. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow ageing as a natural part of my life. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure draws on the energy statement method from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
